core_mechanism: a third-order phase transition in a large-parameter limit, at whose critical point the properly centered-and-scaled fluctuations of an extremal quantity collapse onto the universal Tracy-Widom edge-scaling law, reached by mapping a constrained ensemble onto a matrix-integral partition function
brief_reason: The abstract maps the reunion probabilities to a Yang-Mills partition function, exhibits a third-order phase transition at L_c ~ sqrt(N) in the large-N limit, and finds the scaled quantity near the critical point to be exactly the Tracy-Widom distribution of a random matrix's largest eigenvalue.
